name: The Last Vampire Hunter
short_description: As the last of a long lineage of Vampire Hunters, Beaumont Lacaster finds himself in the doorsteps of Nosferatu's Castle. By defeating him, he can rid humanity of the curse and evil of vampires. Will he be able to defeat Nosferatu?
detailed_description:
PRESENTATION


This is a classic 2D RPG in the style of Ashes of Immortality and Black Home.

As the last of a long lineage of Vampire Hunters, Beaumont Lacaster finds himself in the doorsteps of Nosferatu's Castle. By defeating him, he can rid humanity of the curse and evil of vampires.

Will he be able to defeat Nosferatu and fulfill his lineage's destiny or will he fall leaving humanity unprotected against heartless monsters?

FEATURES


* Touching storyline
* Semi-open world experience
* Beautiful locations to explore
* Quest Journal to keep track of your progress
* Mouse Support
